_note: One-off recording for u1 sources Extension #2 (FD L6.5). Tests must NOT re-fetch — they replay this body via httpx.MockTransport. Re-record only when the live feed structure changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. Yahoo's rssindex feed has no <description> element on items (per FD L6.5: summary=None on emitted NormalizedItem); <pubDate> is ISO 8601 with Z suffix on items (channel-level pubDate uses RFC 822 form, but channel pubDate is not consumed). <source> element carries the originating outlet (e.g. "Reuters", "Barchart"), captured into raw_metadata.rss_source.
